checks.a_analysis: The visual organization of the document is severely compromised. The source PDF is a slide-based presentation that relies heavily on a combination of graphics, annotated screenshots, and text to convey its message. In the HTML output, the visual structure of most slides is lost. For example, Slide 2's horizontal icon-and-text layout is collapsed into a vertical list interrupted by incorrect images (a footer logo and a black box). Furthermore, the instructional flow of the tutorial sections (Slides 3-13) is destroyed because only the headers remain, while the visual context of the application screenshots is entirely absent.
checks.b_evidence_source: Slide 2 shows a four-part horizontal layout with icons. Slides 3-13 feature full-page screenshots of a web application with instructional overlays.
checks.b_evidence_output: The HTML version of Slide 2 is a vertical list with misplaced elements. The sections corresponding to Slides 3-13 contain only headings followed by blank space.

checks.a_analysis: The source document does not contain any formal data tables; it is primarily composed of lists and annotated images.

The conversion failed to capture almost all meaningful images from the source. This includes the application screenshots on pages 3-13, map examples on pages 15-21, data visualizations (map and donut charts) on page 22, and the QR code on page 25. Additionally, the icons on slide 2 are missing, replaced by a misplaced footer logo and a solid black rectangle.
checks.b_evidence_source: Slides 3-13 contain annotated screenshots. Slide 22 contains a map and charts. Slide 25 contains a large QR code. Slide 2 contains four icons (clock, pin, papers, database).
checks.b_evidence_output: No images are present under headers 'Choose map type' through 'Confirmation and delivery emails'. The North Carolina section lacks the map and charts. The final section lacks the QR code. Slide 2 shows a black box and an irrelevant logo.

checks.a_analysis: I did not observe any instances where content blocks, text paragraphs, or headers were visually duplicated in the HTML output.

The overall visual quality is poor. The HTML is largely composed of empty whitespace where informative screenshots should be, making it unusable as a guide. Slide 2 is particularly poorly rendered, with a solid black rectangle and a misplaced footer logo breaking up the flow of text.
checks.b_evidence_source: Slide 2 features clean icons and text. The tutorial slides (3-13) are visually dense with information.
checks.b_evidence_output: The HTML for Slide 2 includes a solid black box and an irrelevant logo. The tutorial sections consist of sparse headers with no content.
